context: Tests whether the agent checks rollout status before restart, uses kubectl rollout restart, verifies completion with status and timeout, documents the restart with annotations, and avoids jumping straight to restart.

checklist.name: Pre-restart status
checklist.description: Script checks kubectl rollout status before performing restart

checklist.name: Diagnostic context
checklist.description: Documentation includes checking events, logs, or describe before deciding restart is needed

checklist.name: Rollout restart command
checklist.description: Uses kubectl rollout restart deployment/<name> command

checklist.name: Post-restart verification
checklist.description: Uses kubectl rollout status with --timeout flag to verify restart completes

checklist.name: Namespace specified
checklist.description: All kubectl commands include -n production namespace

checklist.name: Pod status checked
checklist.description: Verifies pods are Running and Ready after restart with kubectl get pods

checklist.name: Restart documented
checklist.description: Uses kubectl annotate to document the restart reason in deployment metadata

checklist.name: No immediate restart
checklist.description: Does NOT restart as first action without checking current state and gathering context

checklist.name: Timeout specified
checklist.description: Includes --timeout flag on rollout status command (e.g., --timeout=120s)
